nl_query: List all faculty members who prepared the answer key for the Algorithms exam and whether they are also in the evaluator pool for that course.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, ep.is_available AS is_in_evaluator_pool
FROM   evaluator_pool ep
JOIN   board b ON b.id = ep.board_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = ep.faculty_cache_id
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.id = b.exam_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = b.course_id
WHERE  ak.qp_id = esc.qp_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
  AND  au.name = 'Algorithms'
ORDER  BY fc.name;
error: Validation failed (semantic): LEFT JOIN on alias 'au' is nullified by 'WHERE au.name = ...' which eliminates NULL rows. Move the filter into the ON clause: LEFT JOIN ... ON ... AND au.name = ..., or change to INNER JOIN if zero-match rows should be excluded.
